title: Health Laboratory Practioners (Fees, Charges Forms, and Registers) Regulations, 2010
title_en: Health Laboratory Practioners (Fees, Charges Forms, and Registers) Regulations, 2010

provisions.title: 1 . Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Health Laboratory Practitioners (Fees, Charges, Forms and Registers) Regulations, 2010 and shall come to operational on the date of publication.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless context requires otherwise: “ Act ” means the Health Laboratory Practitioners Act. [Cap. 48] Part II – Preliminary provisions

provisions.title: Payment of fee
provisions.content: (1) Every person who has been provisionally, temporarily or fully registered or enrolled, enlisted or licensed under Part III of the Act shall be required to pay a prescribed fee. (2) Subject to sub regulation (1) , the fees set out in the First Schedule to these Regulations shall be payable in respect of the matter set out thereof. (3) All supervisors shall be responsible for records of payment of fees and charges made under this Part. (4) For the purpose of sub-regulation (1) , all fees or charges shall be paid in a Bank Account choosen by the Council and the receipt thereof shall be submitted to the supervisor or any other person appointed by the Council. (5) Any prescribed fee or charges under these Regulations shall be paid on the due date. First Schedule (Made under Regulation 3(2)) Fees and charges S/NO. Activity Fees payable 1. Full Registration Degree Tshs. 50.000 Diploma Tshs. 40.000 2. Provisional registration Tsh. 30.000 3. Temporary Registration more than six months USD 500 (foreigner) 4. Enrollment fee Tshs. 20.000 5. Licensing fee Tshs. 10.000 6. Visiting professional fee less than six months USD. 100 7. Retention fee 50% Registration enrolment, or enlisted fee 8. Overdue Retention Fee Penalty 50% Retention fee 9. Issuance of extract from the Register. Citizen 20.000/= Roll and List foreigner 100 USD 10. Renewal fee enrolment, or enlisted fee 150% Registration. II. Annual training assessment fee Tshs. 250.000 12. Additional qualification Tshs. 20.000/= Second Schedule (Made under Regulation 6(1)) Notice of an inquiry Form HLPA - 1 Form HLPA - 2 Form HLPA - 3 Form HLPA - 4 Form HLPA - 5 Information that shall be included in the register, roll or record of licensed persons made under section 51(d) of the Act The Health Laboratory Practitioner Council register for health laboratory practitioners full registration S/No. Reg No. Full name Sex Address Qualification Training institution Date of registration Additional qualification Remarks The Health Laboratory Practitioner Council register for health laboratory practitioners temporary registration S/No. Reg No. Full name Sex Address Qualification Training institution Date of registration Employment Remarks The Health Laboratory Practitioner Council register for health laboratory practitioners provisional registration S/No. Reg No. Full name Sex Address Qualification Training institution Date of registration Employment to which registration applies Remarks The Health Laboratory Practitioner Council roll for health laboratory practitioners enrolment registration S/No. Reg No. Full name Sex Address Qualification Training institution Date of registration Employer Remarks The Health Laboratory Practitioner Council list for non-health laboratory professionals (licencees) enlistment registration S/No. Reg No. Full name
